commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review should choose the canonical iMessage media branch and enforce PR-head live bridge proof; there is no narrow automated repair that can supply contributor environment proof.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern was found; the diff stays within iMessage send logic and tests and does not change dependencies, CI, secrets, or install scripts. (sha=f7fe4e67d7462e0276907acb4eef6b5b583afbfe)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes iMessage media sends so direct-handle and captioned media route through `send-attachment`, with captions sent as follow-up text and focused send-path tests added.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +102. Total +143 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live run: current main only attempts attachment handoff for media-only explicit chat targets, while direct handles and captioned media fall through to RPC `send` with `file`. The linked issue also reports the bridge rejecting that legacy path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should choose the canonical iMessage media branch and enforce PR-head live bridge proof; there is no narrow automated repair that can supply contributor environment proof.

target.title: fix: route iMessage DM media through attachment handoff
target.body:
## Summary
- route direct-handle iMessage media sends through `send-attachment` instead of the legacy RPC `send` + `file` path
- send captioned media as an attachment handoff followed by a normal text message
- add regression coverage for direct-handle media-only, direct-handle captioned media, and explicit-chat captioned media

## Test Plan
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts -t "routes DM handle media-only sends through send-attachment|sends DM handle media captions as attachment plus follow-up text|sends explicit chat media captions as attachment plus follow-up text"`
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts`
- [x] `pnpm test:extension imessage`

## Notes
- AI-assisted: yes
- This PR is intentionally scoped to the iMessage media handoff fix only.
- Latest `upstream/main` has been merged into this branch to keep it current with `main`.
- Focused local verification on the current PR head is green; see the checked commands above.
- Merge blocker: PR-head real Mac/iMessage bridge proof is still missing, so the external-PR real-behavior gate remains unsatisfied.
- Overlap: #87715 addresses the same issue and already includes live proof, so maintainers still need to choose a canonical landing path if this branch does not add its own proof.

Closes #87597
target.author: hoyalim

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
